initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT item.i_category, SUM(store_sales.ss_net_profit) AS total_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
WHERE household_demographics.hd_dep_count = 6
GROUP BY item.i_category
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    item.i_category,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_net_profit) AS total_profit
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
WHERE 
    household_demographics.hd_dep_count = 6
GROUP BY 
    item.i_category
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    item.i_category,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_net_profit) AS total_profit
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
WHERE 
    household_demographics.hd_dep_count = 6
GROUP BY 
    item.i_category
LIMIT 100

SELECT i_category, SUM(ss_net_profit) AS total_profit
FROM store_sales, item, date_dim, household_demographics
WHERE ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
  AND ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  AND ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  AND c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
  AND hd_dep_count = 6
GROUP BY i_category
LIMIT 100
